content.content: The file /Users/aryansurana/server/index.ts has been updated successfully.

content.text:
Updated `/Users/aryansurana/server/index.ts` `runMigrations()` to add the two missing `users` columns.

Changes:
- Kept the existing `content_posts` migration block intact (only refined its log/warn message prefix to `content_posts skipped` for clarity in failure logs).
- Added a new `try/catch` block running `ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS has_video_marketing BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE`.
- Added a second `try/catch` block running `ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS has_video_marketing_addon BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE`.

Each migration is in its own `try/catch` so one failure won't block the others. Column types match the schema (`BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE`). No other files were touched.
